text.title: User Story Mapping Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply User Story Mapping end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: frame-journey
step.action: Define user, big goal, journey start + end.

step.name: build-backbone
step.action: Write 5-10 verb-phrase activities left-to-right; read aloud.

step.name: add-tasks
step.action: Per activity, list tasks vertically by priority; include error paths.

step.name: draw-skeleton
step.action: Draw line separating walking skeleton (one task / activity) from rest.

step.name: slice-releases
step.action: Partition remaining tasks into full-backbone release rows.
